name: vcmusic-pwa
description: Aggregator Musik Viral PWA & Android App

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -rv assets dist/ && cp *.html style.css app.js sw.js manifest.json robots.txt sitemap.xml app-ads.txt ads.txt dist/ && (cp vcmusic.apk dist/ || true)
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap-init: npx cap init VCMusic com.vcsound.app --web-dir dist

author: VCMusic Team
